manifest.title: Cursor Cloud Agent Worker
manifest.author: Benn Eichhorn <benneic@users.noreply.github.com>
manifest.tagline: Self-hosted Cursor Cloud Agent worker on your Cloudron
manifest.description: Run a Cursor Cloud Agent worker (My Machines) on Cloudron. Pre-built image with Cursor CLI, browser automation, and an admin UI for auth and repository settings.
manifest.changelog:
* Initial release
* My Machines worker (agent worker start)
* Admin UI with browser sign-in and API key fallback
* Fat image: Cursor CLI, Node 20, Playwright/Chromium, build tools
manifest.postInstallMessage: Open **Configure** (`/admin`), connect Cursor, set your repository URL and worker name, then pick this machine at [cursor.com/agents](https://cursor.com/agents).
